comparison_title: Baseline v2 vs v3: FashionCLIP Integration Impact

summary.overall_improvement: Significant performance gains across all metrics

top1_accuracy_analysis.v2_performance: 22.2% - Standard CLIP struggles with fashion-specific features
top1_accuracy_analysis.improvement_reason: Fashion-specific pre-training enables better understanding of style, silhouette, and details

top5_accuracy_analysis.v2_performance: 64.1% - Decent retrieval but misses nuanced matches
top5_accuracy_analysis.v3_performance: 71.5% - Improved retrieval with fashion domain knowledge
top5_accuracy_analysis.improvement_reason: FashionCLIP's fashion-specific embeddings create better similarity rankings

mrr_analysis.v2_performance: 0.407 - Average rank of correct match is ~2.5
mrr_analysis.improvement_reason: Better alignment between JSON metadata and fashion-specific image features

similarity_analysis.improvement_reason: FashionCLIP embeddings are more compatible with fashion metadata

training_efficiency.notes: FashionCLIP converges faster than standard CLIP due to domain alignment

key_insights: FashionCLIP provides 36.5% relative improvement in Top-1 accuracy
MRR improvement of 18.9% indicates better ranking quality
Positive similarity increased by 18.8%, showing stronger cross-modal alignment
Fashion-specific pre-training is crucial for fashion metadata alignment

recommendations.production_deployment: v3 with FashionCLIP is recommended for production
further_improvements: Fine-tune FashionCLIP on K-Fashion dataset for additional gains
Experiment with larger batch sizes for better contrastive learning
Consider ensemble with v2 for robustness
next_steps: Deploy v3 model to API endpoints
A/B test v2 vs v3 in production

conclusion: FashionCLIP integration (v3) delivers significant improvements over standard CLIP (v2), making it the recommended model for production deployment. The fashion-specific pre-training provides better understanding of fashion attributes, resulting in 36.5% relative improvement in Top-1 accuracy and 11.6% in Top-5 accuracy.
